name: airbnb_room
description: Get Airbnb room. Returns normalized Airbnb public room details.

name: airbnb_room_calendar
description: Get Airbnb room calendar. Returns public calendar month hints parsed from Airbnb room bootstrap data.

name: airbnb_room_reviews
description: Get Airbnb room reviews. Returns normalized Airbnb public review snippets.

name: airbnb_search
description: Search Airbnb stays. Returns normalized Airbnb public web search results.

ne_lat.description: Northeast latitude for bounded map search

ne_lng.description: Northeast longitude for bounded map search

sw_lat.description: Southwest latitude for bounded map search

sw_lng.description: Southwest longitude for bounded map search

zoom.description: Map zoom for bounded map search

name: amazon_product
description: Retrieve Amazon product details. Returns normalized product details for an Amazon ASIN on `amazon.com`, including pricing, availability, overview data, inline review samples, and descriptive content.

name: amazon_search
description: Search Amazon products. Returns normalized Amazon search result cards for `amazon.com`.

name: amazon_suggest
description: Retrieve Amazon search suggestions. Returns typeahead keyword suggestions from Amazon's public suggestion API for `amazon.com`.

name: apple_podcasts_charts
description: Retrieve Apple Podcasts chart rankings. Returns Apple Podcasts show chart rankings from public iTunes RSS JSON feeds. Supported collections are `toppodcasts` and `topaudiopodcasts`.

limit.description: Number of chart items to return

name: apple_podcasts_episodes_search
description: Search Apple Podcasts episodes. Returns normalized Apple Podcasts episodes from Apple's public iTunes Search API.

name: apple_podcasts_search
description: Search Apple Podcasts shows. Returns normalized Apple Podcasts shows from Apple's public iTunes Search API.

name: apple_podcasts_show
description: Retrieve Apple Podcasts show details. Returns normalized show metadata from Apple's public iTunes Lookup API.

name: apple_podcasts_show_episodes
description: Retrieve Apple Podcasts show episodes. Returns a show and its public Apple Podcasts episodes from Apple's iTunes Lookup API.

name: appstore_app
description: Retrieve full App Store app details. Returns normalized app metadata from the App Store lookup API. Provide either `id` or `app_id`.

name: appstore_developer
description: Retrieve apps by developer ID. Returns App Store apps associated with a specific developer artist ID.

name: appstore_list
description: Retrieve App Store collection rankings. Returns ranked App Store apps from an iTunes RSS collection, optionally expanded to full lookup details.

full_detail.description: Expand each app via lookup API

name: appstore_privacy
description: Retrieve App Store privacy disclosures. Returns the app privacy cards shown on the App Store page, including data categories and purposes.

name: appstore_ratings
description: Retrieve App Store ratings histogram. Returns total ratings count and the 1-5 star histogram shown on the App Store product page.

name: appstore_reviews
description: Retrieve App Store reviews. Returns one page of customer reviews for an app. Provide either `id` or `app_id`.

name: appstore_search
description: Search the App Store. Returns App Store search results for a term. Set `ids_only=true` to return only app IDs.

name: appstore_similar
description: Retrieve "You Might Also Like" apps. Returns the related apps shown on the App Store product page. Provide either `id` or `app_id`.

name: appstore_suggest
description: Retrieve App Store search suggestions. Returns suggested search terms for the given partial keyword.

name: appstore_version_history
description: Retrieve App Store version history. Returns the version history entries shown in the App Store "What's New" section.

name: bing_images
description: Search Bing image results. Returns normalized Bing image search results for a query string. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us. Results are fetched from public Bing image HTML/async pages and return 503 when Bing serves a challenge page or unusable HTML.

count.description: Results per page; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..50

country.description: Two-letter country code; defaults to us

lang.description: Bing UI language; defaults to en-us

name: bing_news
description: Search Bing news results. Returns normalized Bing news search results for a query string. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us. Results are fetched from public Bing news HTML/async pages and return 503 when Bing serves a challenge page or unusable HTML.

count.description: Results per page; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..50

country.description: Two-letter country code; defaults to us

lang.description: Bing UI language; defaults to en-us

name: bing_search
description: Search Bing web results. Returns normalized Bing web search results for a query string, including organic results, optional context panel data, related queries, people-also-ask questions, news modules, video modules, and page-based pagination. Empty optional blocks are omitted from the JSON response. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us. Results are fetched with the repo's Chrome-impersonated request client and return 503 when Bing serves a challenge page or unusable HTML.

count.description: Results per page; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..50

country.description: Two-letter country code; defaults to us

lang.description: Bing UI language; defaults to en-us

name: bing_suggest
description: Suggest Bing search queries. Returns Bing autosuggest query completions for a query prefix. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us. Suggestions are fetched from public Bing suggest endpoints and trimmed to the requested count.

count.description: Suggestions to return; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..12

country.description: Two-letter country code; defaults to us

lang.description: Bing UI language; defaults to en-us

name: bing_videos
description: Search Bing video results. Returns normalized Bing video search results for a query string. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us. Results are fetched from public Bing video HTML/async pages and return 503 when Bing serves a challenge page or unusable HTML.

count.description: Results per page; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..50

country.description: Two-letter country code; defaults to us

lang.description: Bing UI language; defaults to en-us

name: brand_retrieve
description: Retrieve brand data by domain. Fetches a domain's homepage and extracts a normalized brand profile (title, description, colors, logos, backdrops, socials, links, and any schema.org organization data). Enrichment-only fields that are not present in the page markup are returned as null.

domain.description: Domain to retrieve brand data for, e.g. context.dev

force_language.description: Accepted for compatibility; not applied in HTML-only mode

maxSpeed.description: Optimize for speed by skipping schema.org and footer-link extraction

maxAgeMs.description: Cache freshness window in milliseconds, clamps to 1 day..1 year

timeoutMS.description: Upstream fetch timeout in milliseconds, clamps to 1000..300000

name: brave_images
description: Search Brave image results. Returns normalized Brave image search results for a query string. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us. Results are fetched from public Brave Search image HTML and return 503 when Brave serves a challenge page or unusable HTML.

offset.description: Zero-based Brave result page; defaults to 0

count.description: Results to return; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..50

country.description: Brave result country; defaults to us

lang.description: Brave UI language; defaults to en-us

name: brave_news
description: Search Brave news results. Returns normalized Brave news search results for a query string. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us. Results are fetched from public Brave Search news HTML and return 503 when Brave serves a challenge page or unusable HTML.

offset.description: Zero-based Brave result page; defaults to 0

count.description: Results to return; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..50

country.description: Brave result country; defaults to us

lang.description: Brave UI language; defaults to en-us

time_range.description: Preset time filter: any, day, week, month, year, or custom

date_from.description: Custom start date in YYYY-MM-DD; requires date_to

date_to.description: Custom end date in YYYY-MM-DD; requires date_from

name: brave_search
description: Search Brave. Returns normalized web search results from Brave Search for a query string, along with offset-based pagination, related queries, discussions, videos, and the right-side knowledge card when Brave includes one. Use time_range for preset ranges or date_from/date_to for a custom YYYY-MM-DD range. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us.

country.description: Brave result country; defaults to us

lang.description: Brave UI language; defaults to en-us

time_range.description: Preset time filter: any, day, week, month, year, or custom

date_from.description: Custom start date in YYYY-MM-DD; requires date_to

date_to.description: Custom end date in YYYY-MM-DD; requires date_from

name: brave_suggest
description: Suggest Brave search queries. Returns Brave autosuggest query completions for a query prefix. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us. Suggestions are fetched from public Brave Search suggest JSON and trimmed to the requested count.

count.description: Suggestions to return; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..12

country.description: Brave result country; defaults to us

lang.description: Brave UI language; defaults to en-us

name: brave_videos
description: Search Brave video results. Returns normalized Brave video search results for a query string. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en-us. Results are fetched from public Brave Search video HTML and return 503 when Brave serves a challenge page or unusable HTML.

offset.description: Zero-based Brave result page; defaults to 0

count.description: Results to return; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..50

country.description: Brave result country; defaults to us

lang.description: Brave UI language; defaults to en-us

time_range.description: Preset time filter: any, day, week, month, year, or custom

date_from.description: Custom start date in YYYY-MM-DD; requires date_to

date_to.description: Custom end date in YYYY-MM-DD; requires date_from

name: coingecko_categories
description: CoinGecko categories. Returns normalized CoinGecko category rows from the public categories page. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

name: coingecko_category_coins
description: CoinGecko category coins. Returns normalized coin rows from a CoinGecko public category page. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

slug.description: CoinGecko category slug such as stablecoins

name: coingecko_chains
description: CoinGecko chains. Returns normalized chain rows from the CoinGecko public website chains table. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

name: coingecko_chain
description: CoinGecko chain detail. Returns normalized sections from a CoinGecko public chain detail page. Sections are omitted when not present. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

id.description: CoinGecko chain id such as ethereum

limit.description: Rows per section to return, default 20, max 100

name: coingecko_coin
description: CoinGecko coin profile. Returns normalized CoinGecko profile, market stats, links, and categories for one coin id. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum and is not intended for real-time trading.

id.description: CoinGecko coin id such as bitcoin

name: coingecko_coin_analysis
description: CoinGecko coin chart analysis. Returns derived price-chart metrics from CoinGecko public chart JSON. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum and is not investment advice or real-time trading data.

id.description: CoinGecko coin id such as bitcoin

name: coingecko_exchange
description: CoinGecko exchange detail. Returns normalized profile stats and market rows from a CoinGecko public exchange page. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

id.description: CoinGecko exchange id such as binance

name: coingecko_exchanges
description: CoinGecko exchanges. Returns normalized exchange rows from CoinGecko public website exchange tables. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

name: coingecko_gainers_losers
description: CoinGecko crypto gainers and losers. Returns normalized rows from CoinGecko's public crypto gainers and losers table. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

limit.description: Rows per section to return, default 20, max 100

name: coingecko_global
description: CoinGecko global market snapshot. Returns normalized global market metrics from CoinGecko's public charts page.

name: coingecko_global_charts
description: CoinGecko global chart series. Returns normalized global chart series from public CoinGecko website JSON endpoints.

limit.description: Rows per series to return, default 120, max 500

name: coingecko_learn_articles
description: CoinGecko Learn articles. Returns normalized article cards from CoinGecko Learn public pages.

name: coingecko_markets
description: CoinGecko markets. Returns normalized cryptocurrency market rows from CoinGecko public pages. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum and is not intended for real-time trading.

name: coingecko_new_coins
description: CoinGecko new cryptocurrencies. Returns normalized rows from CoinGecko's public new cryptocurrencies table. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

name: coingecko_news
description: CoinGecko news cards. Returns normalized article cards from CoinGecko's public news page.

name: coingecko_nft_category
description: CoinGecko NFT category. Returns normalized NFT collection rows from a CoinGecko public NFT category page. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

slug.description: CoinGecko NFT category slug such as metaverse

name: coingecko_nfts
description: CoinGecko NFT collections. Returns normalized NFT collection rows from the CoinGecko public website NFT table. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

name: coingecko_search
description: CoinGecko discovery search. Returns normalized CoinGecko search sections from the public website search JSON. Empty valid searches return empty arrays.

limit.description: Rows per section to return, default 10, max 50

name: coingecko_token_unlocks
description: CoinGecko incoming token unlocks. Returns normalized rows from CoinGecko's public incoming token unlocks page.

name: coingecko_treasuries
description: CoinGecko crypto treasuries. Returns normalized entity rows from CoinGecko's public crypto treasuries tables. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

holder_type.description: Treasury holder type filter, default all

name: coingecko_trending
description: CoinGecko trending highlights. Returns deduped trending coins and categories from the public CoinGecko highlights page. This endpoint supports the documented `vs_currency` enum.

limit.description: Rows per section to return, default 20, max 50

name: datasets_list
description: List stored scraped datasets. Lists available read-only scraped datasets. Initial dataset id enum: `google-map-businesses`.

name: datasets_google_map_businesses_facets
description: Facet stored Google Maps businesses. Returns terms aggregation counts for Google Maps businesses. Facet enum: `category`, `country`, `state`, `county`, `city`, `town`, `website_status`.

facet.description: Facet enum: category, country, state, county, city, town, website_status

q.description: Full-text business search query, max 256 characters

radius_m.description: Radius in meters, 1 through 50000; requires lat and lon when supplied

sort.description: Sort enum: relevance, updated_at_desc, rating_desc, review_count_desc, distance_asc

name: datasets_google_map_businesses_item
description: Get a stored Google Maps business. Returns one stored Google Maps business by Google place_id from dataset id enum value `google-map-businesses`.

name: datasets_google_map_businesses_nearby
description: Search nearby stored Google Maps businesses. Searches stored Google Maps businesses near a coordinate in dataset id enum value `google-map-businesses`.

page_size.description: Page size, defaults to 20 and maxes at 100; page * page_size must be <= 10000

name: datasets_google_map_businesses_search
description: Search stored Google Maps businesses. Searches Google Maps business records stored in Elasticsearch. Sort enum: `relevance`, `updated_at_desc`, `rating_desc`, `review_count_desc`, `distance_asc`.

q.description: Full-text business search query, max 256 characters

lat.description: Latitude for radius filtering or distance sort

lon.description: Longitude for radius filtering or distance sort

radius_m.description: Radius in meters, 1 through 50000; requires lat and lon when supplied

sort.description: Sort enum: relevance, updated_at_desc, rating_desc, review_count_desc, distance_asc

page_size.description: Page size, defaults to 20 and maxes at 100; page * page_size must be <= 10000

name: ebay_item
description: Get eBay item details. Returns normalized details for a public eBay item listing.

name: ebay_search
description: Search eBay listings. Returns normalized eBay search results.

name: ebay_seller
description: Get eBay seller profile. Returns normalized details for a public eBay seller profile.

name: ebay_seller_about
description: Get eBay seller about details. Returns normalized seller about information from the public eBay store about tab, including seller stats, top-rated status, optional location/member-since fields, and cleaned store categories.

name: ebay_seller_feedback
description: Get eBay seller feedback. Returns normalized seller feedback summary, detailed ratings, and recent review cards from the public eBay seller feedback tab.

name: ebay_seller_shop
description: Get eBay seller shop listings. Returns normalized listings from the public eBay seller shop tab, with pagination backed by the store odtRefresh response.

name: geocoding_lookup
description: Lookup Nominatim OSM ids. Returns typed Nominatim JSONv2 places for comma-separated OSM ids such as W34633854,N123,R456.

osm_ids.description: Comma-separated OSM ids such as W34633854,N123,R456

accept_language.description: Preferred result language, forwarded to Nominatim

addressdetails.description: Include address details, defaults to true

name: geocoding_reverse
description: Reverse geocode coordinates. Returns the nearest typed Nominatim JSONv2 place for latitude and longitude.

accept_language.description: Preferred result language, forwarded to Nominatim

addressdetails.description: Include address details, defaults to true

name: geocoding_search
description: Search Nominatim places. Returns typed Nominatim JSONv2 forward geocoding results. Use either q or structured fields, not both.

limit.description: Maximum results, defaults to 10 and clamps to 20

accept_language.description: Preferred result language, forwarded to Nominatim

addressdetails.description: Include address details, defaults to true

name: google_finance_analyst_articles
description: Google Finance analyst articles. Returns normalized analyst article results for a quote.

name: google_finance_chart
description: Google Finance chart data. Returns normalized chart points for a quote and window.

name: google_finance_classification
description: Google Finance classification data. Returns normalized classification strings for a quote.

name: google_finance_company
description: Google Finance company data. Returns normalized company information from Google Finance.

name: google_finance_context
description: Returns normalized Google Finance context search results.

name: google_finance_financials
description: Google Finance financial statements. Returns normalized annual and quarterly financial rows when Google Finance has statement data for the quote.

name: google_finance_markets_category_news
description: Google Finance category news. Returns normalized news for a Google Finance category.

name: google_finance_markets_category_stocks
description: Google Finance category stocks. Returns normalized instruments for a Google Finance category.

name: google_finance_markets_earnings
description: Google Finance earnings calendar. Returns normalized earnings calendar instruments.

name: google_finance_markets_featured
description: Google Finance featured stocks. Returns normalized featured instruments.

name: google_finance_markets_headline
description: Google Finance top headline. Returns the top Google Finance headline.

name: google_finance_markets_indices
description: Google Finance market indices. Returns normalized market index instruments.

name: google_finance_markets_movers
description: Google Finance market movers. Returns normalized market mover instruments.

count.description: Result count

name: google_finance_markets_top
description: Google Finance top stocks by metric. Returns normalized top instruments for a Google Finance metric.

name: google_finance_markets_trending
description: Google Finance trending stocks. Returns normalized trending instruments.

name: google_finance_news
description: Google Finance quote news. Returns normalized news articles for a quote.

name: google_finance_quote
description: Google Finance Quote API. Fetches the latest quote data for a provided stock symbol from Google Finance https://www.google.com/finance/quote/AAPL:NASDAQ?hl=en.

quote.description: Stock symbol to fetch the latest quote for (e.g., AAPL:NASDAQ, BTC-USD)

name: google_finance_related
description: Google Finance related instruments. Returns normalized related instruments for a quote.

name: google_finance_search
description: Google Finance Search API. Fetches normalized search results for a provided keyword from Google Finance.

name: google_finance_ticker
description: Google Finance Ticker API. Fetches chart ticker data from Google Finance based on a provided ticker and window period.

ticker.description: Ticker symbol to fetch data for example:AAPL:NASDAQ, BTC-USD

window.description: Time window for the ticker data (default: 1d), options: 1d, 5d, 1m, 6m, 1y, 5y, max

name: google_map_place
description: Google Maps place details API. Returns detailed information for a specified place_id. Rate limit is enforced at 1 request per second.

name: google_map_search
description: Google Maps search API. Returns results from Google Maps based on search options. Rate limit is enforced at 1 request per second.

name: google_trends_categories
description: Google Trends categories. Returns supported top-level Google Trends category ids and labels for Trending Now category filters.

name: google_trends_enums
description: Google Trends enum metadata. Returns supported Google Trends enum values for explore/trending filters, including locations, date ranges, search types, categories, statuses, and sort modes.

name: google_trends_explore
description: Google Trends explore data. Returns normalized Google Trends keyword analytics from internal Trends widget requests: interest over time, interest by region, related queries, and related topics when available.

name: google_trends_explore_interest_by_region
description: Google Trends interest by region. Returns only the interest-by-region widget from the Google Trends Explore widget flow. Supports multiple comparison terms and returns an empty interest_by_region array when Google returns no rows.

name: google_trends_explore_interest_over_time
description: Google Trends interest over time. Returns only the interest-over-time timeline from the Google Trends Explore widget flow. Supports multiple comparison terms.

name: google_trends_explore_related_topics
description: Google Trends related topics. Returns only the related topics widget from the Google Trends Explore widget flow. Returns an empty related_topics array when Google returns no topic rows for the requested term/filter combination.

name: google_trends_explore_rising_queries
description: Google Trends explore rising queries. Returns the Rising related queries widget for one or more Google Trends explore terms. Returns an empty queries array when Google returns no rows for the requested term/filter combination.

name: google_trends_explore_top_queries
description: Google Trends explore top queries. Returns the Top related queries widget for one or more Google Trends explore terms. Returns an empty queries array when Google returns no rows for the requested term/filter combination.

name: google_trends_locations
description: Google Trends locations. Returns supported Google Trends location codes. Explore endpoints also accept WORLDWIDE.

name: google_trends_trending
description: Google Trends trending now data. Returns normalized Google Trends Trending Now rows from the internal TrendsUi batch RPC replay.

name: google_trends_trending_detail
description: Google Trends trending term detail. Returns the Explore detail widgets for a single trending term, including interest over time, regional interest, top/rising related queries, and related topics when Google returns them.

name: google_jobs
description: Search Google Jobs. Returns normalized Google Jobs results parsed from public Google web responses.

name: google_news
description: Search Google News. Returns normalized Google News vertical results (title, source, link, age) parsed from the public Google News results page. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en. Returns 503 when Google serves a challenge page or unusable HTML.

count.description: Results per page; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..50

country.description: Two-letter country code; defaults to us

lang.description: Google UI language; defaults to en

name: google_search
description: Google search API. Returns normalized Google web search results. Results are fetched through Rayobrowse-rendered Chrome with availability fanout and stale-cache fallback when available. The endpoint returns 503 when Google serves a challenge page or unusable HTML. Rate limit is enforced at 1 request per second, and if the limit is exceeded a 429 status code is returned with rate limit headers.

name: google_suggest
description: Suggest Google search queries. Returns Google autosuggest query completions from the public unauthenticated suggest JSON endpoint.

count.description: Suggestions to return; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..12

country.description: Google result country; defaults to us

lang.description: Google UI language; defaults to en

name: google_videos
description: Search Google video results. Returns normalized Google video vertical results (title, platform, link, duration, age) parsed from the public Google video results page. Locale defaults to country=us and lang=en. Returns 503 when Google serves a challenge page or unusable HTML.

count.description: Results per page; defaults to 10, clamped to 1..50

country.description: Two-letter country code; defaults to us

lang.description: Google UI language; defaults to en

name: googleplay_app
description: Retrieve full Google Play app details. Returns normalized app metadata from a Google Play details page, including installs, ratings, pricing, version info, developer metadata, media assets, release state, and selected user comments. Defaults: `country=us`, `lang=en`.

name: googleplay_categories
description: Retrieve Google Play app categories. Returns category ids found in the Google Play apps navigation.

name: googleplay_datasafety
description: Retrieve Google Play data safety details. Returns the data safety information displayed on Google Play.

name: googleplay_developer
description: Retrieve apps by Google Play developer. Returns apps published by a developer id or developer name.

full_detail.description: Resolve each app to full detail

name: googleplay_list
description: Retrieve apps from a Google Play top collection. Returns apps from a Google Play collection and category.

full_detail.description: Resolve each app to full detail

name: googleplay_permissions
description: Retrieve Google Play app permissions. Returns Google Play permission groups or a short permission name list.

name: googleplay_reviews
description: Retrieve Google Play reviews. Returns one or more pages of app reviews. Set `paginate=true` to fetch only the requested page.

name: googleplay_search
description: Search Google Play. Returns Google Play search results for a term.

full_detail.description: Resolve each app to full detail

name: googleplay_similar
description: Retrieve similar Google Play apps. Returns apps from the "Similar apps" cluster on an app details page.

full_detail.description: Resolve each app to full detail

name: googleplay_suggest
description: Retrieve Google Play query suggestions. Returns up to 10 suggestions for a search term.

name: instagram_post
description: Retrieve a specific Instagram post by user ID and post ID. Returns the media details of a specific post from an Instagram user.

name: instagram_profile
description: Retrieve an Instagram user profile by username. Returns public profile details for a specified Instagram username.

name: instagram_reels
description: Retrieve Instagram Reels for a user. Returns a feed of Instagram Reels for the specified user ID. Supports pagination via `max_id`.

max_id.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of Reels

name: justwatch_age_certifications
description: Get JustWatch age certifications. Returns JustWatch age certification technical names for a country.

name: justwatch_discover
description: Discover JustWatch titles. Returns popular movies and shows filtered by optional genre short names, provider short names, monetization types, and release year bounds. Type accepts only `all`, `movie`, or `show`; monetization_types accepts only `FLATRATE`, `FREE`, `ADS`, `RENT`, or `BUY`.

limit.description: Maximum results, defaults to 20 and clamps to 50

monetization_types.description: Comma-separated monetization types: FLATRATE, FREE, ADS, RENT, BUY

name: justwatch_episode_by_id
description: Get JustWatch episode by raw id. Looks up an episode by raw JustWatch GraphQL id such as `tse5550494` and returns normalized metadata and offers.

id.description: Raw JustWatch episode id matching tse[0-9]+

name: justwatch_episode_offers
description: Get JustWatch episode offers. Returns normalized offers for a raw JustWatch episode id across one to five comma-separated country codes.

id.description: Raw JustWatch episode id matching tse[0-9]+

countries.description: One to five comma-separated two-letter country codes

name: justwatch_genre_titles
description: Get JustWatch genre titles. Returns popular titles for one JustWatch genre short name such as `act`. Type accepts only `all`, `movie`, or `show`.

limit.description: Maximum results, defaults to 20 and clamps to 50

name: justwatch_genres
description: Get JustWatch genres. Returns JustWatch genre short names and localized translations.

name: justwatch_monetization_titles
description: Get JustWatch monetization titles. Returns popular titles for one monetization type. monetization_type accepts only `FLATRATE`, `FREE`, `ADS`, `RENT`, or `BUY`; type accepts only `all`, `movie`, or `show`.

monetization_type.description: Monetization type: FLATRATE, FREE, ADS, RENT, BUY

limit.description: Maximum results, defaults to 20 and clamps to 50

name: justwatch_new
description: Get new JustWatch titles. Returns newly available movies and shows from the public JustWatch website GraphQL endpoint. Type accepts only `all`, `movie`, or `show`; limit defaults to 20 and clamps to 50.

limit.description: Maximum results, defaults to 20 and clamps to 50

name: justwatch_popular
description: Get popular JustWatch titles. Returns popular movies and shows from the public JustWatch website GraphQL endpoint. Type accepts only `all`, `movie`, or `show`; limit defaults to 20 and clamps to 50.

limit.description: Maximum results, defaults to 20 and clamps to 50

name: justwatch_provider_titles
description: Get JustWatch provider titles. Returns popular movie/show titles available through a JustWatch provider short name such as `nfx`.

limit.description: Maximum results, defaults to 20 and clamps to 50

name: justwatch_providers
description: Get JustWatch providers. Returns the credential-free public JustWatch provider catalog for a country.

name: justwatch_search
description: Search JustWatch titles. Searches JustWatch titles using the public credential-free website GraphQL endpoint. Country must be a two-letter ISO code such as `US`; language must be a two-letter code such as `en`.

limit.description: Maximum results, defaults to 10 and clamps to 25

name: justwatch_season_by_id
description: Get JustWatch season by raw id. Looks up a season by raw JustWatch GraphQL id such as `tss297253`.

id.description: Raw JustWatch season id matching tss[0-9]+

name: justwatch_season_episodes
description: Get JustWatch season episodes. Returns episodes and normalized episode offers for a raw JustWatch season id such as `tss297253`.

season_id.description: Raw JustWatch season id matching tss[0-9]+

name: justwatch_show_seasons
description: Get JustWatch show seasons. Returns seasons for a raw JustWatch show id such as `ts287292`.

show_id.description: Raw JustWatch show id matching ts[0-9]+

name: justwatch_title
description: Get JustWatch title details. Fetches a JustWatch title page and returns normalized metadata and current offers. Pass exactly one of `path` or `url`.

name: justwatch_title_analysis
description: Analyze JustWatch title availability. Fetches a JustWatch title page and summarizes provider availability, monetization buckets, formats, price ranges, and best rent/buy/free/subscription options. Pass exactly one of `path` or `url`.

name: justwatch_title_by_id
description: Get JustWatch title by raw id. Looks up a movie or show by raw JustWatch GraphQL id such as `tm92641` or `ts287292`.

id.description: Raw JustWatch movie/show id matching tm[0-9]+ or ts[0-9]+

name: justwatch_title_media
description: Get JustWatch title media. Returns normalized credits, clips, and backdrops for a raw JustWatch movie/show id such as `tm92641`.

id.description: Raw JustWatch movie/show id matching tm[0-9]+ or ts[0-9]+

name: justwatch_title_offers
description: Get JustWatch title offers. Returns normalized offers for a raw JustWatch movie/show id across one to five comma-separated country codes.

id.description: Raw JustWatch movie/show id matching tm[0-9]+ or ts[0-9]+

countries.description: One to five comma-separated two-letter country codes

name: justwatch_title_similar
description: Get similar JustWatch titles. Returns similar titles for a raw JustWatch movie/show id such as `tm92641`.

id.description: Raw JustWatch movie/show id matching tm[0-9]+ or ts[0-9]+

limit.description: Maximum results, defaults to 10 and clamps to 25

name: linkedin_company
description: Get LinkedIn Company info by ID. Returns detailed company information by LinkedIn ID.

name: linkedin_product
description: Get LinkedIn Product info by ID. Returns detailed product information from LinkedIn by product ID.

name: linkedin_showcase
description: Get Linkedin Showcase Page Info. Returns detailed information about a LinkedIn showcase page by ID.

name: producthunt_category
description: Retrieve Product Hunt category details. Returns the category page payload for a Product Hunt category slug.

name: producthunt_category_products
description: Retrieve Product Hunt category products. Returns the paginated category listing payload for a Product Hunt category slug.

name: producthunt_leaderboard
description: Retrieve Product Hunt leaderboard. Fetches Product Hunt leaderboard data for daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly scopes via Product Hunt GraphQL.

scope.description: Leaderboard scope: daily, weekly, monthly, yearly

date.description: Anchor date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Used to derive missing year/month/day/week values.

order.description: Ranking order override. Defaults to scope rank enum.

name: producthunt_product
description: Retrieve Product Hunt product details. Returns the core Product Hunt product details.

id.description: Product Hunt slug or numeric ID

name: producthunt_about
description: Retrieve Product Hunt product about page. Returns the richer Product Hunt about-page payload, including launch, forum, review tags, and media data.

name: producthunt_alternatives
description: Retrieve Product Hunt product alternatives. Returns paginated alternatives, tags, and related discussions for a Product Hunt product.

name: producthunt_customers
description: Retrieve Product Hunt product customers. Returns paginated customer products for a Product Hunt product using Product Hunt's ProductCustomersPage GraphQL operation.

name: producthunt_launches
description: Retrieve Product Hunt product launches. Returns paginated launch posts for a Product Hunt product using Product Hunt's ProductPageLaunches GraphQL operation.

name: producthunt_makers
description: Retrieve Product Hunt product makers. Returns maker items for a Product Hunt product.

name: producthunt_reviews
description: Retrieve Product Hunt product detailed reviews. Returns detailed review items for a Product Hunt product.

name: producthunt_search
description: Search for products, users, or launches on Product Hunt. Performs a full-text Product Hunt search and returns matching products, users, or launches.

featured.description: Launch search only: featured launches only

topics.description: Launch search only: comma-separated topic slugs

name: reddit_comments
description: Get Reddit post comments. Returns flat public comment entries from a Reddit post.

id.description: Reddit post id or t3_ id

sort.description: Accepted for compatibility: confidence, top, new, controversial, old, or qa. Public comment data is flat and may ignore sort.

limit.description: Maximum comments returned, defaults to 25 and clamps to 100

depth.description: Accepted for compatibility. Public comment data is flat and may ignore depth.

name: reddit_post
description: Get Reddit post. Returns a normalized public Reddit post entry.

id.description: Reddit post id or t3_ id

name: reddit_search
description: Search Reddit posts. Searches public Reddit content and returns normalized public post entries.

subreddit.description: Restrict search to a subreddit name, without r/

sort.description: Sort: relevance, hot, new, top, or comments

time.description: Time window for top/comments sorts: hour, day, week, month, year, or all

limit.description: Maximum posts, defaults to 25 and clamps to 100

name: reddit_subreddit_posts
description: List Reddit subreddit posts. Returns normalized public posts from a subreddit.

sort.description: Sort: hot, new, top, or rising

time.description: Time window for top sort: hour, day, week, month, year, or all

limit.description: Maximum posts, defaults to 25 and clamps to 100

name: shop_app_analysis
description: Analyze Shop.app query results. Returns a market snapshot derived from Shop.app search results, including price ranges, currencies, sale counts, discounts, and top shops. Limit defaults to 20 and accepts values up to 50.

limit.description: Maximum products to analyze, defaults to 20 and supports up to 50

name: shop_app_categories
description: List Shop.app categories. Returns public Shop.app product categories.

name: shop_app_product
description: Get Shop.app product. Returns normalized public product details from Shop.app.

name: shop_app_product_related
description: List Shop.app related products. Returns related product cards from a public Shop.app product page.

limit.description: Maximum products, defaults to 20 and supports up to 50

name: shop_app_product_reviews
description: List Shop.app product reviews. Returns public product reviews from a Shop.app product page.

limit.description: Maximum reviews, defaults to 20 and supports up to 50

name: shop_app_product_shop
description: Get the Shop.app shop for a product. Resolves the public Shop.app merchant profile for a product id.

name: shop_app_product_variant
description: Get a Shop.app product variant by selected options. Returns the exact public product variant matching selected options. selected_options must be a JSON object when provided. Repeated option filters may also be sent as option.Name=value or option[Name]=value.

name: shop_app_product_variants
description: List Shop.app product variants. Returns adjacent variants for a Shop.app product. selected_options must be a JSON object when provided. Repeated option filters may also be sent as option.Name=value or option[Name]=value.

limit.description: Maximum variants, defaults to 50 and supports up to 100

name: shop_app_search
description: Search Shop.app products. Searches Shop.app product results using the credential-free public web search flow. Limit defaults to 20 and accepts values up to 50.

limit.description: Maximum products, defaults to 20 and supports up to 50

name: shop_app_shop
description: Get Shop.app shop. Returns public Shop.app merchant profile details.

name: shop_app_collection_products
description: List Shop.app collection products. Returns public product cards from a Shop.app merchant collection. sort_by allowed values: MOST_SALES, PRICE_LOW_TO_HIGH, PRICE_HIGH_TO_LOW, RELEVANCE.

limit.description: Maximum products, defaults to 30 and supports up to 60

name: shop_app_shop_locations
description: List Shop.app shop locations. Returns public retail locations for a Shop.app merchant profile.

limit.description: Maximum locations, defaults to 10 and supports up to 50

name: shop_app_shop_products
description: List Shop.app shop products. Returns public product cards from a Shop.app merchant profile. sort_by allowed values: MOST_SALES, PRICE_LOW_TO_HIGH, PRICE_HIGH_TO_LOW, RELEVANCE.

limit.description: Maximum products, defaults to 30 and supports up to 60

name: shop_app_shop_reviews
description: List Shop.app shop reviews. Returns public reviews for a Shop.app merchant profile.

limit.description: Maximum reviews, defaults to 20 and supports up to 50

name: shop_app_shop_typeahead
description: Suggest products and collections inside a Shop.app shop. Returns public store typeahead suggestions for a Shop.app merchant profile.

limit.description: Maximum suggestions, defaults to 20 and supports up to 20

name: shop_app_suggestions
description: Suggest Shop.app searches. Returns Shop.app autocomplete suggestions. Limit defaults to 10 and supports up to 20.

limit.description: Maximum suggestions, defaults to 10 and supports up to 20

name: shopify_collections
description: List Shopify collections. Returns normalized collections from a public Shopify `/collections.json` endpoint. Valid empty result pages return `200` with an empty collections array.

limit.description: Maximum collections, defaults to 50 and supports up to 250

name: shopify_collection_products
description: List Shopify collection products. Returns normalized products from a public Shopify collection `/products.json` endpoint.

limit.description: Maximum products, defaults to 50 and supports up to 250

name: shopify_pages
description: List Shopify pages. Returns normalized static pages from a public Shopify `/pages.json` endpoint. Page body HTML is returned as cleaned text only.

limit.description: Maximum pages, defaults to 50 and supports up to 250

name: shopify_page
description: Get Shopify page. Returns normalized page detail from Shopify's credential-free `/pages/{handle}.json` endpoint. Page body HTML is returned as cleaned text only.

name: shopify_products
description: List Shopify products. Returns normalized products from a public Shopify `/products.json` endpoint. Valid empty result pages return `200` with an empty products array.

limit.description: Maximum products, defaults to 50 and supports up to 250

name: shopify_product
description: Get Shopify product. Returns normalized product detail from Shopify's credential-free product handle `.js` endpoint.

name: shopify_product_recommendations
description: List Shopify product recommendations. Returns normalized recommended products from Shopify's credential-free recommendations Ajax endpoint. The route handle is resolved to a Shopify product id before fetching recommendations.

limit.description: Maximum products, defaults to 10 and supports up to 20

intent.description: Recommendation intent. Allowed values: related, complementary

name: shopify_search_suggest
description: Get Shopify search suggestions. Returns products, collections, and query suggestions from Shopify's credential-free predictive search Ajax endpoint.

types.description: Comma-separated suggestion types. Allowed values: product, collection, query

limit.description: Maximum results per type, defaults to 10 and supports up to 20

name: shopify_sitemap_urls
description: List Shopify sitemap URLs. Fetches capped URL entries from Shopify child sitemaps matching the requested type.

type.description: Sitemap type. Allowed values: all, products, collections, pages, blogs, agentic_discovery, other

limit.description: Maximum URL entries, defaults to 50 and supports up to 250

name: shopify_sitemaps
description: List Shopify sitemaps. Returns child sitemap URLs from a public Shopify `/sitemap.xml` index with inferred sitemap types.

name: shopify_store
description: Get Shopify store metadata. Resolves a public Shopify storefront and returns normalized metadata from credential-free storefront JSON. If the vanity domain blocks `/products.json`, the service may fall back to a public `*.myshopify.com` domain discovered from the storefront page.

name: similarweb_search
description: Search SimilarWeb Info. Returns SimilarWeb data for a given query (typically a domain).

name: similarweb_web
description: Get SimilarWeb Web Info. Returns traffic and engagement data from SimilarWeb for a specific domain.

domain.description: Domain to fetch SimilarWeb data for

name: spotify_album
description: Retrieve Spotify album details. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player album metadata and tracks from private Pathfinder responses.

uri.description: Spotify album URI or open.spotify.com album URL

name: spotify_album_tracks
description: Retrieve Spotify album tracks. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player album tracks from private Pathfinder responses.

uri.description: Spotify album URI or open.spotify.com album URL

name: spotify_albums_search
description: Search Spotify albums. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player album search results for a search term. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_artist
description: Retrieve Spotify artist details. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player artist overview data from private Pathfinder responses.

uri.description: Spotify artist URI or open.spotify.com artist URL

name: spotify_artist_albums
description: Retrieve Spotify artist albums. Returns artist discography items from Spotify Web Player private Pathfinder responses.

uri.description: Spotify artist URI or open.spotify.com artist URL

type.description: album, single, compilation, appears_on, or all

name: spotify_artist_playlists
description: Retrieve Spotify artist playlists. Returns artist playlists from Spotify Web Player private Pathfinder responses.

uri.description: Spotify artist URI or open.spotify.com artist URL

name: spotify_artist_related
description: Retrieve Spotify related artists. Returns related artists from Spotify Web Player private Pathfinder responses.

uri.description: Spotify artist URI or open.spotify.com artist URL

name: spotify_artists_search
description: Search Spotify artists. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player artist search results for a search term.

name: spotify_audiobook
description: Retrieve Spotify audiobook details. Returns Spotify Web Player audiobook metadata from private Pathfinder responses. Spotify exposes audiobooks through show URIs.

uri.description: Spotify audiobook/show URI or open.spotify.com show URL

name: spotify_audiobook_chapters
description: Retrieve Spotify audiobook chapters. Returns audiobook chapters from Spotify Web Player private Pathfinder responses.

uri.description: Spotify audiobook/show URI or open.spotify.com show URL

name: spotify_audiobooks_search
description: Search Spotify audiobooks. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player audiobook search results for a search term. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_chapter
description: Retrieve Spotify audiobook chapter details. Returns a Spotify chapter from the same private Pathfinder operation used for episodes and chapters.

uri.description: Spotify chapter or episode URI/URL

name: spotify_episodes_search
description: Search Spotify episodes. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player episode search results for a search term.

name: spotify_featured_charts_by_country
description: Retrieve Spotify featured charts by country. Returns normalized Spotify country hub content from Spotify's countryHubContent Pathfinder response. Defaults to the CHARTS content shelf for the requested country.

content_id.description: Country hub content ID. Allowed: CHARTS, POPULAR_ALBUMS, POPULAR_ARTISTS, TRENDING_SONGS

name: spotify_genre
description: Retrieve Spotify genre page. Returns normalized sections and items from Spotify's browsePage Pathfinder response for a Spotify genre or page URI.

uri.description: Spotify genre or page URI

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_home
description: Retrieve Spotify home sections. Returns normalized shelves and items from Spotify's Web Player home Pathfinder response. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

time_zone.description: IANA time zone used by Spotify home personalization

sp_t.description: Optional Spotify session token. A random UUID is generated when omitted

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_playlist
description: Retrieve Spotify playlist details. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player playlist metadata and items from Spotify's fetchPlaylist Pathfinder response. Provide either uri or id; defaults to a known public playlist when omitted.

uri.description: Spotify playlist URI or open.spotify.com playlist URL

id.description: Spotify playlist ID. Used when uri is omitted

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_playlists_search
description: Search Spotify playlists. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player playlist search results for a search term. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_popular_by_country
description: Retrieve Spotify popular by country. Returns normalized Spotify country hub shelves from Spotify's countryHubsPage Pathfinder response. The country_code parameter accepts Spotify popular-in country codes from open.spotify.com/popular-in/us.

name: spotify_profile
description: Retrieve Spotify public profile. Returns normalized public profile metadata and preview playlists from Spotify's Web Player user-profile service. Provide username, uri, or url; defaults to Spotify's official profile.

uri.description: Spotify user URI

playlist_limit.description: Embedded public playlist limit, clamped to 0-50

artist_limit.description: Recently played artist limit, clamped to 0-50

name: spotify_profile_followers
description: Retrieve Spotify public profile followers. Returns normalized public follower profiles from Spotify's Web Player user-profile service. Spotify exposes this as a public anonymous response for some profiles; private or restricted profiles may return an upstream error.

uri.description: Spotify user URI

name: spotify_profile_playlists
description: Retrieve Spotify public profile playlists. Returns normalized public playlists from Spotify's Web Player user-profile service. Provide username, uri, or url; defaults to Spotify's official profile.

uri.description: Spotify user URI

name: spotify_profiles_search
description: Search Spotify profiles. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player profile search results for a search term. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_search
description: Search Spotify catalog. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player catalog search results across tracks, artists, albums, playlists, shows, episodes, audiobooks, and top results. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

limit.description: Result limit per section, clamped to 1-50

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

is_prefix.description: Treat the search term as a prefix

name: spotify_section
description: Retrieve Spotify browse section. Returns normalized items from Spotify's browseSection Pathfinder response for a Spotify section URI.

uri.description: Spotify section URI

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_shows_search
description: Search Spotify shows. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player show search results for a search term.

name: spotify_track
description: Retrieve Spotify track details. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player track metadata from Spotify's getTrack Pathfinder response. Provide either uri or id; defaults to a known public track when omitted.

uri.description: Spotify track URI or open.spotify.com track URL

id.description: Spotify track ID. Used when uri is omitted

name: spotify_track_recommended
description: Retrieve Spotify recommended tracks. Returns normalized recommended Spotify entities from the internalLinkRecommenderTrack Pathfinder response.

uri.description: Spotify track URI or open.spotify.com track URL

id.description: Spotify track ID. Used when uri is omitted

name: spotify_track_similar_albums
description: Retrieve Spotify track similar albums. Returns normalized albums from the similarAlbumsBasedOnThisTrack Pathfinder response.

uri.description: Spotify track URI or open.spotify.com track URL

id.description: Spotify track ID. Used when uri is omitted

name: spotify_tracks_search
description: Search Spotify tracks. Returns normalized Spotify Web Player track search results for a search term. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_podcasts_categories
description: Retrieve Spotify Podcasts categories. Returns normalized Spotify podcast category sections and items from Spotify's all-categories browsePage Pathfinder response.

uri.description: Spotify podcast categories page URI

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_podcasts_charts
description: Retrieve Spotify podcast charts. Returns normalized Spotify podcast chart rankings from podcastcharts.byspotify.com. The chart and region parameters are validated against Spotify's supported podcast chart slugs and countries. Category charts are available only in au, br, de, gb, mx, se, and us.

chart.description: Chart slug. Allowed: top-podcasts, top-episodes, trending, arts, business, comedy, education, fiction, health-fitness, history, leisure, music, news, religion-spirituality, science, society-culture, sports, technology, true-crime, tv-film

region.description: Two-letter region code. Allowed: ar, au, at, br, ca, cl, co, dk, fi, fr, de, in, id, ie, it, jp, mx, nz, no, ph, pl, es, se, nl, gb, us

name: spotify_podcasts_episode
description: Retrieve Spotify podcast episode details. Returns normalized public episode metadata from Spotify's getEpisodeOrChapter Pathfinder response, with episode page, embed page, and anonymous oEmbed fallbacks when Pathfinder is unavailable. Provide either uri or id; defaults to a known public episode when omitted.

uri.description: Spotify episode URI or open.spotify.com episode URL

id.description: Spotify episode ID. Used when uri is omitted

name: spotify_podcasts_home
description: Retrieve Spotify Podcasts home. Returns normalized sections and items from Spotify's podcast home browsePage Pathfinder response.

uri.description: Spotify page or genre URI

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_podcasts_search
description: Search Spotify Podcasts. Returns normalized Spotify podcast shows, episodes, and top results for a search term.

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_podcasts_show
description: Retrieve Spotify podcast show metadata. Returns normalized podcast show metadata from Spotify Pathfinder.

uri.description: Spotify show URI

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_podcasts_show_episodes
description: Retrieve Spotify podcast show episodes. Returns normalized podcast episodes for a Spotify show URI.

uri.description: Spotify show URI

include_episode_content_ratings_v2.description: Include Spotify episode content ratings v2

name: spotify_podcasts_show_recommendations
description: Retrieve Spotify podcast recommendations. Returns normalized related Spotify shows and episodes from Spotify's show recommendations response.

uri.description: Spotify show URI

name: tiktok_category
description: List TikTok explore categories. Returns the category list exposed by the TikTok Explore page.

name: tiktok_video_comments
description: Retrieve TikTok video comments. Returns top-level TikTok video comments with cursor-based pagination.

aweme_id.description: TikTok video id from the video URL

name: tiktok_explore
description: Retrieve the TikTok explore feed for a category. Returns explore videos for a TikTok category id from the category endpoint.

id.description: Category type id returned by the category endpoint

name: tiktok_challenge
description: Retrieve TikTok hashtag details. Returns the metadata payload for a TikTok hashtag page.

name: tiktok_challenge_list
description: Retrieve TikTok hashtag posts. Returns the videos listed for a TikTok hashtag id with cursor-based pagination.

id.description: Hashtag id returned by the hashtag detail endpoint

name: tiktok_popular_trend_country_industry_meta
description: Retrieve TikTok popular-trend country and industry metadata. Returns the country and industry metadata used by the TikTok Creative Center popular-trend endpoints.

name: tiktok_popular_trend_creator
description: Retrieve TikTok popular-trend creators. Returns trending creators from TikTok Creative Center. The service clamps `page` to 1-10 and `limit` to at most 100.

limit.description: Maximum number of creators to return

audience_count.description: Accepted for compatibility but currently ignored by the upstream request

name: tiktok_post
description: Retrieve TikTok video details. Returns the TikTok video detail payload for a video id.

name: tiktok_profile_post
description: Retrieve posts from a TikTok profile. Returns posts from a TikTok profile by `secUid`, with optional cursor pagination and sort mode.

name: tiktok_profile
description: Retrieve a TikTok profile. Returns the TikTok profile payload for a public handle.

name: tiktok_search
description: Search TikTok videos. Searches TikTok videos by keyword with cursor-based pagination.

count.description: Result count, clamped to 50

name: tiktok_search_hashtag
description: Search TikTok hashtags. Searches TikTok hashtags/challenges by keyword with cursor-based pagination.

count.description: Result count, clamped to 50

name: tiktok_search_user
description: Search TikTok users. Searches TikTok users by keyword with cursor-based pagination.

name: tiktok_top_ads_analysis
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads interactive time analysis. Returns the detail-page interactive time analysis chart and percentile for a Top Ads material. Metric values are `retain_ctr` (CTR), `retain_cvr` (CVR), `click_cnt` (Clicks), `convert_cnt` (Conversion), and `play_retain_cnt` (Remain).

name: tiktok_top_ads_detail
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads detail. Returns detail for one TikTok Creative Center Top Ads material. Use `material_id`; the upstream does not accept `id` or `materialId`.

name: tiktok_top_ads_filters
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads filters. Returns filter metadata for TikTok Creative Center Top Ads. Dynamic values come from TikTok; static UI enums are included for `order_by`, `duration`, `like`, and `ad_format`.

name: tiktok_top_ads_list
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads. Returns high-performing auction ads from TikTok Creative Center. The service defaults `period` to 30, `page` to 1, `limit` to 20, and `order_by` to `for_you`. Use `/tiktok/top-ads/filters` for dynamic enum values and static enums for order, duration, likes, and ad format.

limit.description: Maximum number of ads to return

country_code.description: Country code or comma-separated country codes from /tiktok/top-ads/filters

industry.description: Industry filter id or comma-separated ids from /tiktok/top-ads/filters

objective.description: Objective filter id or comma-separated ids from /tiktok/top-ads/filters

ad_language.description: Ad language id or comma-separated ids from /tiktok/top-ads/filters

pattern_label.description: Pattern label id or comma-separated ids from /tiktok/top-ads/filters

like.description: Like percentile bucket id or comma-separated ids

name: tiktok_top_ads_location_info
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads location info. Returns the initial location and industry context used by TikTok Creative Center Top Ads.

name: tiktok_top_ads_locations
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads locations. Returns available Top Ads location filters from TikTok Creative Center.

name: tiktok_top_ads_recommend
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads recommendations. Returns recommended Top Ads materials related to a material id.

limit.description: Maximum number of ads to return

name: tiktok_top_ads_safety
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads safety configuration. Returns public Creative Center safety configuration flags related to search surfaces.

name: tiktok_top_ads_spotlight
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads Spotlight. Returns Top Ads Spotlight materials handpicked by TikTok Creative Center.

limit.description: Maximum number of ads to return

name: tiktok_top_ads_suggestions
description: Retrieve TikTok Top Ads suggestions. Returns Top Ads search suggestions from TikTok Creative Center.

count.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return

name: tiktok_trending
description: Retrieve TikTok trending posts. Returns the current TikTok trending feed.

name: tripadvisor_autocomplete
description: Autocomplete TripAdvisor locations and places. Returns normalized TripAdvisor public typeahead candidates from the credential-free GraphQL endpoint.

name: tripadvisor_enums
description: Get TripAdvisor enum metadata. Returns supported TripAdvisor enum values for place/listing filters, including locales, currencies, languages, listing types, filters, amenities, and category ids.

name: tripadvisor_hotels
description: Search TripAdvisor hotels. Returns normalized TripAdvisor hotel listing results from public credential-free GraphQL listing data.

filter_id.description: Optional filter id such as class or ufe

travelers_choice_botb.description: Filter Best of the Best properties

name: tripadvisor_place
description: Get TripAdvisor place. Returns a rich normalized TripAdvisor place profile from public place HTML, using configured browser fallbacks when direct HTML is blocked.

name: tripadvisor_reviews
description: Get TripAdvisor reviews. Returns normalized TripAdvisor public reviews from credential-free GraphQL review data. Pass either id or url.

name: tripadvisor_search
description: Search TripAdvisor places. Returns normalized TripAdvisor place listings for hotels, restaurants, attractions, and supported attraction category types.

travelers_choice_botb.description: Filter Best of the Best hotels

name: trustpilot_business_search
description: Search Trustpilot business units. Returns normalized business-unit search results from Trustpilot's JSON business-unit search API.

country.description: Two-letter country code; defaults to US

page_size.description: Results per page; defaults to 20, maximum 100

name: trustpilot_business
description: Get Trustpilot business profile. Returns a summary Trustpilot business profile parsed from the public business page.

name: trustpilot_business_related
description: Get Trustpilot related businesses. Returns related company cards from Trustpilot's public business page rails.

name: trustpilot_business_reviews
description: Get Trustpilot business reviews. Returns paginated Trustpilot business reviews parsed from the public review page.

stars.description: Filter by star rating from 1 to 5

replied.description: Filter to reviews with business replies

language.description: Review language code used by Trustpilot

date_from.description: Date range start in YYYY-MM-DD; currently rejected by upstream

date_to.description: Date range end in YYYY-MM-DD; currently rejected by upstream

name: trustpilot_categories
description: Get Trustpilot categories. Returns the Trustpilot public category index grouped by top-level category.

name: trustpilot_category_search
description: Search Trustpilot categories. Returns normalized category search results from Trustpilot's JSON category search API.

country.description: Two-letter country code; defaults to US

locale.description: Locale in ll-CC format; defaults to en-US

size.description: Maximum number of categories; defaults to 20

name: trustpilot_category
description: Get Trustpilot category detail. Returns category metadata, company cards, and side rails from Trustpilot's public category page.

name: usage_me_endpoints
description: Get current user's endpoint usage breakdown. Returns per-endpoint request and credit totals for the selected UTC time range, ordered by request volume.

range.description: Time range preset. Defaults to the current billing period.

limit.description: Maximum endpoints to return. Defaults to 20 and clamps to 100.

from.description: Custom lower bound in RFC3339 format when range=custom

to.description: Custom upper bound in RFC3339 format when range=custom

name: usage_me_overview
description: Get current user's usage overview. Returns a JWT-authenticated user's current billing snapshot plus recent request and credit consumption metrics for the selected UTC time range. The `requests` summary is limited to product API traffic and excludes console, billing, usage, and user-management endpoints.

range.description: Time range preset. Defaults to the current billing period.

from.description: Custom lower bound in RFC3339 format when range=custom

to.description: Custom upper bound in RFC3339 format when range=custom

name: usage_me_recent_ips
description: Get current user's recent API client IPs. Returns recent client IP addresses observed for the JWT-authenticated user's product API traffic, ordered by last seen time. Console, billing, usage, and user-management endpoints are excluded.

range.description: Time range preset. Defaults to the current billing period.

limit.description: Maximum IPs to return. Defaults to 20 and clamps to 100.

from.description: Custom lower bound in RFC3339 format when range=custom

to.description: Custom upper bound in RFC3339 format when range=custom

name: usage_me_timeseries
description: Get current user's usage timeseries. Returns JWT-authenticated request and credit consumption buckets for chart rendering. Results use UTC buckets.

range.description: Time range preset. Defaults to the current billing period.

bucket.description: Bucket size. Defaults to hour for day range and day otherwise.

from.description: Custom lower bound in RFC3339 format when range=custom

to.description: Custom upper bound in RFC3339 format when range=custom

name: yahoo_finance_calendars
description: Lists global Yahoo Finance calendar types supported by this integration.

name: yahoo_finance_calendar
description: Yahoo Finance calendar results. Returns global Yahoo Finance calendar rows for earnings, IPOs, economic events, or splits.

type.description: Calendar type: earnings, ipo, economic-events, or splits

start.description: Start date as YYYY-MM-DD, RFC3339, or Unix seconds

end.description: End date as YYYY-MM-DD, RFC3339, or Unix seconds

name: yahoo_finance_download
description: Yahoo Finance batch historical prices. Returns historical price data for up to 25 symbols.

name: yahoo_finance_industries
description: Yahoo Finance industries. Lists Yahoo Finance industry keys that can be queried with the industry endpoint.

name: yahoo_finance_industry
description: Yahoo Finance industry detail. Returns overview, sector linkage, top companies, growth companies, and research reports for an industry key.

name: yahoo_finance_lookup
description: Yahoo Finance lookup. Returns Yahoo Finance instrument matches for a query, optionally filtered by instrument type.

count.description: Result count

name: yahoo_finance_market_status
description: Yahoo Finance market status. Returns Yahoo Finance open/close status for a market such as US.

name: yahoo_finance_market_summary
description: Returns Yahoo Finance market summary rows for a market such as US.

name: yahoo_finance_screener_custom
description: Runs a constrained Yahoo Finance custom screener query using Yahoo's public screener JSON shape.

name: yahoo_finance_screener
description: Yahoo Finance predefined screener results. Runs a predefined Yahoo Finance screener such as day_gainers or most_actives.

count.description: Result count

name: yahoo_finance_screeners
description: Yahoo Finance predefined screeners. Lists the predefined screeners supported by the Yahoo Finance integration.

name: yahoo_finance_search
description: Yahoo Finance search. Returns normalized Yahoo Finance quotes, news, lists, and optional research reports for a query.

include_research.description: Include research reports when Yahoo returns them

name: yahoo_finance_sectors
description: Yahoo Finance sectors. Lists Yahoo Finance sector keys that can be queried with the sector endpoint.

name: yahoo_finance_sector
description: Yahoo Finance sector detail. Returns overview, top companies, ETFs, mutual funds, industries, and research reports for a sector key.

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_actions
description: Yahoo Finance corporate actions. Returns dividends, splits, and capital gains for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_analysts
description: Yahoo Finance analyst data. Returns recommendations, upgrades/downgrades, price targets, and estimate modules where Yahoo provides them.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_calendar
description: Returns Yahoo Finance calendar events for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_capital_gains
description: Yahoo Finance capital gains. Returns capital gain events for ETF or mutual fund symbols when Yahoo provides them.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as SPY

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_dividends
description: Yahoo Finance dividends. Returns dividend events for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_earnings_dates
description: Yahoo Finance earnings dates. Returns standalone earnings-date rows from Yahoo Finance calendar HTML when Yahoo serves the table.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_earnings
description: Returns Yahoo Finance earnings modules for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_financials
description: Yahoo Finance financial statements. Returns annual, quarterly, or supported trailing income, balance sheet, or cash flow statement data.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_funds
description: Yahoo Finance fund data. Returns fund profile, top holdings, equity/bond holdings, and sector weighting modules for ETF and mutual fund symbols.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as SPY

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_history_metadata
description: Yahoo Finance history metadata. Returns Yahoo Finance chart metadata for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_history
description: Yahoo Finance historical prices. Returns normalized OHLCV points for a symbol. Use either period or start/end.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

include_actions.description: Include dividends, splits, and capital gains

auto_adjust.description: Adjust OHLC prices with adjusted close

back_adjust.description: Back-adjust OHLC prices while keeping close

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_holders
description: Yahoo Finance holders. Returns major, institutional, fund, and insider holder modules for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_info
description: Yahoo Finance ticker info. Returns normalized profile, quote type, price, statistics, and summary modules for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_isin
description: Yahoo Finance ticker ISIN. Returns the experimental yfinance-compatible ISIN lookup result for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_news
description: Yahoo Finance ticker news. Returns Yahoo Finance news search results for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

count.description: News result count

tab.description: News tab: news, all, or press_releases

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_options
description: Yahoo Finance options chain. Returns option expiration dates and the current option chain for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_options_expiration
description: Yahoo Finance options chain by expiration. Returns calls and puts for a specific Unix expiration timestamp.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_quote
description: Yahoo Finance ticker quote. Returns normalized fast quote fields for one Yahoo Finance symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_sec_filings
description: Yahoo Finance SEC filings. Returns Yahoo Finance SEC filing summaries for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_shares_full
description: Yahoo Finance historical share counts. Returns historical shares-out rows from Yahoo fundamentals timeseries.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

start.description: Start date as YYYY-MM-DD, RFC3339, or Unix seconds

end.description: End date as YYYY-MM-DD, RFC3339, or Unix seconds

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_shares
description: Yahoo Finance share counts. Returns current share-count fields from Yahoo key statistics.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_splits
description: Yahoo Finance splits. Returns split events for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_sustainability
description: Yahoo Finance sustainability. Returns ESG and sustainability modules for a symbol.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_ticker_valuation
description: Yahoo Finance valuation measures. Returns the valuation table from the Yahoo Finance key statistics page when Yahoo serves the table.

symbol.description: Yahoo Finance symbol such as AAPL

name: yahoo_finance_trending
description: Yahoo Finance trending symbols. Returns trending Yahoo Finance symbols for a region.

count.description: Symbol count

name: youtube_captions
description: Retrieve auto-generated or human captions. Returns the caption cues for a specific YouTube video.

name: youtube_channel_playlists
description: Retrieve the playlists tab for a YouTube channel. Returns normalized playlist items from a channel's Playlists tab and an optional continuation token.

id.description: Channel ID, @handle, /c path, /user path, or full YouTube channel URL

continuation_token.description: Pagination token returned by a previous request

name: youtube_channel_search
description: Search within a YouTube channel. Returns normalized video search items scoped to a specific channel, including the resolved top-level `query`.

id.description: Channel ID, @handle, /c path, /user path, or full YouTube channel URL

continuation_token.description: Pagination token returned by a previous request

name: youtube_channel_shorts
description: Retrieve the shorts tab for a YouTube channel. Returns normalized short-form video entries from a channel's Shorts tab.

id.description: Channel ID, @handle, /c path, /user path, or full YouTube channel URL

name: youtube_channel_videos
description: Retrieve the videos tab for a YouTube channel. Returns normalized video items from a channel's Videos tab and an optional continuation token.

id.description: Channel ID, @handle, /c path, /user path, or full YouTube channel URL

continuation_token.description: Pagination token returned by a previous request

name: youtube_comments
description: Retrieve video comments (top-level & replies). Returns a page of comments for a specific YouTube video.

continuation_token.description: Pagination token returned by a previous request, first page if empty

name: youtube_playlist
description: Retrieve playlist metadata and items. Returns playlist metadata, normalized video items, and an optional continuation token for pagination.

id.description: YouTube playlist ID or full playlist URL

continuation_token.description: Pagination token returned by a previous request

name: youtube_profile
description: Retrieve channel profile. Returns full profile details for a YouTube channel.

id.description: Channel ID, @handle, /c path, /user path, bare username, or full YouTube channel URL

name: youtube_search
description:
Search YouTube. Returns normalized YouTube search results using YouTube's InnerTube search API.
Pass `continuation_token` from a previous response to retrieve the next page.
Use `q` as the primary query parameter; `search_query` is accepted as an alias.

continuation_token.description: Pagination token returned by a previous request

name: youtube_tag
description:
Retrieve YouTube videos by tag. Returns normalized videos from the public YouTube hashtag page for the supplied tag.
Set `type=shorts` to use the Shorts tab, or pass `continuation_token` from a previous response to fetch the next page.

continuation_token.description: Continuation token for pagination, first page if empty

name: youtube_transcript
description:
Retrieve transcript for a YouTube video. Returns transcript segments for a YouTube video using YouTube's native player captions.
Set `format=text`, `format=srt`, or `format=vtt` to receive plain-text output instead of the standard response envelope.

translate_to.description: Translate transcript to this language code

timestamps.description: Include timestamps in the JSON response

name: youtube_transcript_languages
description: List transcript languages for a YouTube video. Returns the transcript languages exposed by YouTube for a specific video.

name: youtube_video
description: Retrieve video metadata & captions. Returns title, description, stats, and captions for a YouTube video ID.

name: zillow_autocomplete
description: Autocomplete Zillow locations. Returns normalized Zillow public web autocomplete candidates. Semantic candidates may include region_id/region_type compatibility aliases plus region_ids/region_types arrays; prefer complete bounds metadata for Zillow search when present.

status.description: Search context: for_sale, for_rent, or sold

name: zillow_property
description: Get Zillow property. Returns normalized Zillow public property details using Zillow's public persisted GraphQL property payload, including optional typed sections for address parts, listing attribution, pricing, history, media, facts, schools, and nearby homes when present.

name: zillow_search
description: Search Zillow listings. Returns normalized Zillow public listing search results. Callers must pass complete map bounds from autocomplete when available, or a region id fallback.

status.description: Search context: for_sale, for_rent, or sold

region_id.description: Zillow region id from autocomplete, used when complete bounds are not provided

region_type.description: Zillow region type from autocomplete, used with region_id fallback
